mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates, driving immediate equity valuation expansion and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate exceeding 5.0% indicates labor market slack that reduces consumer spending capacity, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in more than 55% of triggered months, or the signal loses predictive power when unemployment remains above 5.0% for consecutive quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in retail sales and housing starts signal a broad contraction in consumer demand, forcing earnings downgrades and negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint decline periods show positive forward returns in more than 60% of cases, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: During monetary tightening cycles, a month-over-month decline in industrial production indicates supply-side constraints that immediately pressure corporate margins, generating negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during tightening yield positive 5-day returns in more than 50% of instances, or the signal reverses direction when tightening exceeds 100 basis points.

mechanism_narrative: A CPIAUCSL index reading above 235 signals entrenched price pressures that force central banks to maintain restrictive policy, compressing equity valuations over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns exceed +0.5% in more than 65% of triggered observations, or the threshold effect disappears when inflation expectations remain anchored below 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly payroll employment growth directly increases aggregate income and corporate revenue expectations, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains negative over consecutive 12-month periods, or payroll growth above 150k fails to produce positive forward returns in more than 50% of months.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between quarterly GDP growth and monthly retail sales, where GDP expands but retail sales contract, indicates weakening consumer transmission that eventually drags equity returns negative over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Divergence periods produce positive forward returns in more than 55% of cases, or the GDP-retail sales spread loses predictive power when government spending drives GDP growth.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production falls below its 12-month moving average, supply chain bottlenecks and capacity constraints immediately trigger risk-off positioning, causing negative 5-day equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 60% of triggered instances, or the signal fails to predict returns when inventory drawdowns offset production declines.
